title: ToLaserBlade
description: Adds a sword with a laser blade.
body: # ToLaserBlade **ToLaserBlade (T. o. Laser Blade) mod adds a simple sword with a laser blade.** **Note** - Laser blades may not be compatible with some video options, some graphics improvement mods, and some shader packs - Laser blade attack upgrades may not be compatible with some combat improvement mods (e.g. Golden Age Combat) ## News - **Version 16.0.0 released** for Minecraft 1.21.11 NeoForge/Forge - **Version 1.20.1-7.1.0.0 released** for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge - **Version 1.2.0-bta released** for Minecraft beta 1.7.3 BTA Babric 7.3_04 - [readme](https://github.com/Iunius118/ToLaserBlade-BTA#readme) ## Requirements - NeoForge/Minecraft Forge/Fabric Loader and API ## How to Get Started For version 7+. [Cheatsheet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/ToLaserBlade/1.21.x-forge/CHEATSHEET.txt) ### 1. Craft a **Brand-new Laser Blade I** or **II** **Note**: laser blade blueprint will remain on the crafting grid and the template slot. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/ToLaserBlade/main/docs/img/ver7/laser_blade_recipes_v7.png) ### 2. Use the **Brand-new Laser Blade** Holding the brand-new laser blade in your hand and right-clicking, you can get a laser blade. ![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Luxblsiv/images/d6332173755482cf87823fc5811d989aa60ac3a6.gif) When you name your brand-new laser blade I or II `GIFT` by using an anvil and use it... ## Resource Pack Additional resource pack for ToLaserBlade. This resource pack is available for redistribution. ### tolaserblade_lucent_compat This is a resource pack to make laser blades emit light with [Lucent](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucent) mod (1.18.2+). [tolaserblade_lucent_compat.zip](https://github.com/Iunius118/ToLaserBlade/raw/main/docs/resourcepacks/tolaserblade_lucent_compat.zip)
